title: 5-Minute Desk Stretch Routine
description: Reel format reset routine for office workers, demonstrated standing at a desk.
hook: Five minutes here, eight hours undone.
keyMessage: Five minutes can undo eight hours of sitting.

strategy.keyMessage: Five minutes can undo eight hours of sitting.

creativePlan.hook: Five minutes here, eight hours undone.

video.hook: Five minutes here, eight hours undone.
video.body: If you sit all day, you don't need a workout — you need five resets that take a minute each. No mat, no shoes, no excuses.
video.cta: Follow if you want next week's routine.
hookBank: Five minutes here, eight hours undone.
Your spine knows what it needs. Spoiler: not more sitting.
I do these between meetings. So can you.
If you can stand, you can do this.
video.bRollNotes: Capture from waist up at the desk; cut to feet for ankle circles. Avoid showing the screen.
video.voiceoverNotes: Conversational, like coaching a friend through it. Pause after each cue.

shotList.description: Hook delivered to camera, stood at the desk
Neck rolls — three slow each direction
Standing forward fold with bent knees
Hold final pose, deliver follow CTA
